question: Will we have a popular LLM fine-tuned on people's personal texts by June 1, 2026?
reason: No evidence of a popular LLM fine-tuned on personal texts by June 1, 2026.
evidence: Microsoft Research's March 2026 study found that current LLM-based simulation methods do not pass the Individual Turing Test when fine-tuned on personal messaging data. ([microsoft.com](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/publication/individual-turing-test-a-case-study-of-llm-based-simulation-using-longitudinal-personal-data/?utm_source=openai))
As of May 2026, no major LLM providers have announced plans to fine-tune models on personal texts for widespread public use.
searchQueries: large language models fine-tuned on personal private texts 2026
